text:
Want to know more about Scott Stevens? Get his official bio, social pages and articles on New Country 107.9 YYD!Full Bio

Burger of the Month is a restaurant in Alexandria, Virginia, and they’re celebrating of their own. Fellow Alexandrian, Olympic runnerNoah Lyles, is being honored by having a burger named after him. The burger features “a mix of angus beef, cheddar, bacon, sweet bread and butter pickles, lettuce, tomato, ranch, on a brioche bun.” As an added bonus, while the Noah Lyles burger is available, anyone who finishes it in under 9.79 seconds will get it free!

Source:AlxNow.com
title: Restaurant Names Burger After Olympic Runner Noah Lyles | New Country 107.9 YYD | Scott Stevens
description: Finish it in under 9.79 seconds and get it free!
